Container.Name: SelfMailer
Container.Overview: Self-hosted, multi-user e-mail client (not a mail server). Connects to existing IMAP/POP3/SMTP accounts, with calendar, contacts and notes. Admin can create users and pre-configure their accounts; users can also add accounts themselves. Single Docker container with SQLite - no external database.

Config.Name: Daten-Pfad
Config.Description: Path where the SQLite database is stored.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the SelfMailer web interface and API.

Config.Name: Master Secret
Config.Description: REQUIRED. Long random secret. Used for JWT signing AND at-rest encryption of stored mailbox passwords. Changing it makes saved account passwords unreadable.

Config.Name: Admin Token (optional)
Config.Description: Optional. If set, the first-run admin setup requires this token.

Config.Name: Base URL (optional)
Config.Description: Optional public base URL, e.g. http://192.168.1.69:8090

Config.Name: DB Path
Config.Description: Path to SQLite database. Usually no need to change.

Config.Name: FCM credentials (optional)
Config.Description: Optional. Path to a Firebase service-account JSON for Google push (FCM). Drop the file into the data folder. Leave/remove to disable FCM.

Config.Name: Translate URL (optional)
Config.Description: Optional. URL of a self-hosted LibreTranslate instance for in-app e-mail translation, e.g. http://192.168.1.10:5000 (use the Unraid host IP + the LibreTranslate port, default 5000). Empty = translation feature disabled (the translate button stays hidden).

Config.Name: Translate API Key (optional)
Config.Description: Optional. Only needed if your LibreTranslate instance requires an API key.
